feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Extensibility
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Extensibility Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Creating Production Order Component Line Items via API
entry.content:
Hello Expert,

We are currently working on a Custom Application Developed using the RAP (RESTful ABAP Programming) model in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, where Batch wise line items are being managed.

As part of our requirement, we are using the A_ProductionOrderComponent_4 API to update values in the CO02 Production Order screen. However, this API does not fully meet our needs.

At present, when using the PATCH method, we are only able to modify existing line items and are unable to create new ones.

Our requirement is to create new line items in the Production Order Component along with the corresponding batch details. We would like to understand if there is any POST method or appropriate API available to support this functionality. Alternatively, we would appreciate any recommendations for a suitable approach to achieve this requirement.

Thank you,

Production order Component line Item

entry.title: Accessing and Calling Existing BRF+ Functions in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
I would like to use functions from an existing BRF+ application within a developer extensibility scenario in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.

Using the app "Simplified BRF+ Workbench – Extensibility" (App ID: FDT_WD_WORKBENCH_SIMPLIFIED / FDT_WD_WB_SIMPLIFIED_EXT_AC), I was able to locate the application "OPD WM Handling Unit".

However, when attempting to display the application or one of its functions, I receive the following error message:

"You have no authorization to display object OPD WM Handling Unit"

I assume that the function IDs of standard BRF+ objects are stable and identical across systems, rather than being system-generated, so that they can be used reliably in custom code. That's why my goal is to retrieve the function IDs so that I can call the corresponding BRF+ functions from an ABAP class using CL_FDT_FUNCTION_PROCESS_API.

Is it possible to obtain the necessary authorizations to display these objects in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud?
If not, is there an alternative way to identify and call these existing BRF+ functions from a developer extensibility scenario?

entry.title: Fetch Production Order after reading QM Notification 'Reference No' (QM01) in SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
In SAP Public Cloud 'Create Quality Notification' for Q3, what would be the method to:

  • Read Serial Number from 'NOTIFICATIONEXTREFERENCENUMBER'
  • Fetch Production Order via 'I_SERIALNUMBERMANUFACTURINGORD' and
  • Update QM notification

Unable to find related BADI.

entry.title: Syncing Invoices (Accounts Receivable)/Bills (Accounts Payable) via OData V4?
entry.content:
Hello,

I’m looking to sync Accounts Receivable (Invoices) and Accounts Payable (Bills) from SAP S/4HANA via APIs, and also need to capture deletions for these objects.

From the documentation, it appears that:

  • Invoices may only be available via OData V4 APIs
  • Bills may only be accessible via OData V2 APIs

Can anyone confirm if this is correct?

Additionally, I’m interested in tracking deletions. Some OData V4 APIs return delta tokens, but it’s unclear whether delta handling (including deletions) is supported for Invoices and Bills specifically.

Any clarification before I begin implementation would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you!

entry.title: Updated Key field length of database and when TR is released, error is occurring in RAP Eclipse
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'm new in s4hana cloud public RAP.

I created RAP custom app in Eclipse and deployed to 080 dev tenant.

And later, I updated the key field length and added new field. Since it was able to update successfully, I though there is no problem.

But, now I need to transport/deploy that custom app to Test Tenant.

So, I release the Transport request/task in Eclipse and the following error is occurring.

Changes in ZC_ITEM(CDS_STOB) for Use in Key User Apps, compared to snapshot 100(0000), found by component BC-DWB-DIC: Key element KEY_NO was added.

Changes in ZC_ITEM(CDS_STOB) for Use in Cloud Development, compared to snapshot 100(0000), found by component BC-DWB-DIC: Key element KEY_NO was added. 

API Release: Compatibility of Released Objects

How can I fix that kind of issue quickly and what is the best practice solution?

 

Best Regards,

Aye Chan

entry.title: The released TR in Eclipse is not shown in QA/Test tenant
entry.content:
Hi all,

I created RAP custom app in 080 development tenant by using Eclipse.

I created project package in Superpackage ZPARTNER.

And now, I want to transport to QA/Test tenant (100).

I released the Transport Request/Task in Eclipse and it was successfully released.

But that Transport Request is not shown in Import Collection of QA/Test Tenant (100).

It is because of I created the developed objects under ZPARTNER.

I noticed that I will need to create objects under ZCUSTOM_DEVELOPMENT to be able to transport to Test/PRD.

So, could you please guide me how can I move the developed objects under ZCUSTOM_DEVELOPMENT 

(or) how can I transport to Test Tenant now without creating all objects from start under ZCUSTOM_DEVELOPMENT?

 

Thank You

Best Regards,

Aye Chan

entry.title: QM01 Notification Item Overview defect description LOV search option in SAP Public Cloud
entry.content: Is there a way to add Defect description LOV search option in QM01 Notification Item Overview table without using the Item detail custom field?

entry.title: Create Outgoing Invoice - Custom fields S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I get that the question 'can custom fields be added to Create Outgoing Invoices' a ton of times, but most of the KBAs have been deleted, or the previous responses contradict with what is currently happening in my clients system. 

There are 6 custom fields present in the Coding Block Context, 5 of these are displayed in the item table in Create Outgoing Invoices - there is a previous question with an answer stating 5 is the maximum number of custom fields displayed (the KBA link states the document has been deleted) - Solved: Is it possible to add Custom Fields in "Create Inc... - SAP Community.

Is there any way of manipulating which 5 of the 6 fields are displayed? There are no GUI specific UIs for Coding Block

Is there still a limit of 5 fields?

Does the app still support custom fields? - Later KBAs have stated that there is no support for custom fields at all, but this seems to be inaccurate as fields are visible and are available for input.

Can anyone confirm exactly what is possible and what is not possible?

Thanks

Tom

entry.title: Sorting Issue in Billing Document Item Details CDS Hierarchy
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Currently We are experiencing an issue with sorting of Billing Document Item which were associated with Invoice List documents in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.

Business Requirement:

To display Invoice List data in a structured hierarchy in the PDF Document developed on BTP.

  • Header Level: Invoice List
  • Item Level: Invoice List Items
  • Sub-Item Level: Billing Documents associated with each Invoice List item

The expectation is that Billing Document Items should be displayed in a consistent and sorted order (e.g., by Billing Document and Item Number in ascending order).

Current Behavior:

The Billing Document Item details (3rd level CDS) are not appearing in a consistent or sorted order. The sequence appears random or inconsistent across executions.

Technical Details:

  • We are using only standard CDS views 
  • CDS hierarchy:
    1. Invoice List (Header)
    2. Invoice List Item (Level 2)
    3. Billing Document Items (Level 3)</

entry.title: Adding Legacy Main Asset Number to Asset History Sheet (Public Cloud)
entry.content:
Hi Experts! I would like to ask, if it is possible to add the Legacy Main Asset Number field into the standard report (C_ASSETHISTORYSHEET) or the standard CDS view (I_AssetHistorySheetCube).

We are working on an SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition system, so we need a solution that allows us to enhance the standard application without accessing the backend or using traditional ABAP development. We specifically need this field to be visible and functional within the standard Asset History Sheet app.

Could you please advise on how to resolve this? I would greatly appreciate any guidance, suggestions, or alternative approaches.

Thank you very much for your help!

Best regards, Daniel Fedic

entry.title: How can S/4HANA Cloud(Public) connect to non-SAP systems in a Private Network for Outboundinterface?
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I recently came across S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition for the first time, and I would like to ask you because there is a problem with the interface with the non-SAP system located within the private network(no public IP or domain).

---

**Current Situation**

- **Inbound (Legacy System → S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition):** No issues. I have confirmed that our legacy system can reach the Public Edition API endpoints without problems.
- **Outbound (S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition → Legacy System):** This is where I'm stuck. Since our legacy systems only have private IP addresses and are not exposed to the internet, I'm unsure how S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition can reach them

---

**Questions**

1. **Is SAP Cloud Connector the right approach?**
If so, when configuring Cloud Connector, we can see BTP Subaccount connectivity options — however, we do not see a dedicated Subaccount for S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition itself. We can only find the Subaccount associated with our IAS (Identity Authentication Service) tenant.
- Should we use the IAS-associated Subaccount to connect Cloud Connector to BTP?
- Or does S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition have its own dedicated BTP Subaccount that I'm missing?

2. **If number 1 is not the answer, Is SAP Integration Suite (CPI) mandatory for this Outbound scenario, or is it possible to route Outbound calls directly without CPI?**

3. **If number 1 is not the answer, should it be configured with the following architecture**?

```
S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
↕
SAP BTP(IS? CPI?)
↕ (Cloud Connector Tunnel)
Cloud Connector (On-Premise)
↕
non-SAP System (Private Network)
```

In other words, do we need to first connect Cloud Connector to BTP, and then establish a separate connection from BTP to S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition?
If yes, what specific BTP services or configurations are required to bridge between BTP and S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition for Outbound calls?

---

Any guidance, documentation references, or architecture diagrams would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Getting wierd error while creating communication arrangement
entry.content:
Hello All, any lead would be helpful. Getting some error while creating communication arrangement.

Regards, Ravi

entry.title: Cannot create Custom Fields for Material Document Header in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

We are working on an SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition environment under SAP GROW, and we have encountered a limitation regarding Custom Fields at the Material Document Header level.

Our scenario:

We have a custom Fiori freestyle application that posts Material Documents via the I_MaterialDocumentTP RAP BO. In this application, the user enters an "Ingress ID" which is stored in the Reference Document / Material Document Header Text field (XBLNR / MaterialDocumentHeaderText). This Ingress ID is a key to a custom Z table that holds carrier/transport information (driver name, vehicle plate, tare weight, and gross weight). We need to display these four fields on an Adobe Form associated with the Material Document printout.

The problem:

To achieve this, we need to create four Custom Fields at the Material Document Header level so they can be populated during posting and later consumed by the Adobe Form. However, when we go to the Custom Fields app, the Business Context "Inventory Management: Material Document" (header level) is not available. We can only find "Inventory Management: Material Document Item", which only allows creating custom fields at the item level.

We also explored the available BAdIs:

  • MMIM_ITEM_PROVIDE_DATA — This BAdI works at the item level. We can successfully enrich item-level custom fields, but it does not give us access to header fields like the Reference Document or Header Text.
  • MMIM_HEAD_PROVIDE_DATA — This BAdI works at the header level and provides access to header data. However, since we cannot create custom fields at the header level (due to the missing Business Context), there is no target field to write the transport information to.

What we need:

We need a way to create custom fields at the Material Document Header level, or an alternative approach that allows us to store four carrier-related fields (transport name, driver, plate number, tare weight) at the header level so they can be consumed by an Adobe Form during the Material Document printout.

Our questions:

  1. Is the Business Context "Inventory Management: Material Document" (header level) planned for a future release? If so, which release or timeline?
  2. Is there an alternative extensibility approach to add custom fields to the Material Document Header in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition while remaining Clean Core compliant?
  3. Has anyone faced a similar requirement and found a supported workaround?

Any guidance would be greatly appreciated. Thank you.

entry.title: RFM_ALLOCATION_STRATEGY BAdI
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

Is there anyone who successfully used this BAdI [RFM_ALLOCATION_STRATEGY]?
https://api.sap.com/badi/RFM_ALLOCATION_STRATEGY 
API documentation show it is released for Developer Extensibility.
But when we try to use, we found this information.
"The standard implementation RFM_ALLOCATION_STRATEGY_S001 is already active. Therefore, from a framework perspective, it is not possible to create an additional custom implementation to replace or overwrite the existing standard logic.".
Also, we cannot change the logic in standard class too.
Class : CL_RFM_ALLOCATION_STRATEGY_EX
Error : You have no authorization in S_DEVELOP to switch off the Assistant for CL_RFM_ALLOCATION_STRATEGY_EX

We have S_DEVELOP authorization and still encountering same error.
Any advice please?

Regards,
May

entry.title: Custom Batch Number Creation for Process Order in SAP Public cloud?
entry.content:
Hello,

Strictly in Public Cloud - I have a requirement where custom batch number needs to be assigned in Process Order creation screen for Co - Product, By product and for Order Material.

Is it possible to assign the Batch code by suppressing the internal N/R with the criteria maintained in Z table. For example,  i maintain for material POLYMER as "PL" in z table. And my batch code is assigned as PL0426 (04 is current month & 26 is current year).

I need clarification whether this modification can be done using BADI at COR1 - Create process order, COR2 - Change Process Order, COR6N - Confirmation Order, MIGO - Post Goods movement.

If anyone had done this enhancement, please drop a reply.

Thanks & Regards,

Pranay Teja K.

entry.title: How to create custom fields with supplier bank data (IBAN & BIC) in next-gen Ariba Invoicing?
entry.content:
Hi community, 

to check the invoice, it would be neccassary to compare the bank data (IBAN) written on the invoice with the invoice in the supplier master data.

It would be great, to have it here in this popup.

 

As workaround and idea we though about adding custom fields and fill it with the supplier IBAN and BIC.

We migrate at the moment to next-gen, there is a possiblility for Custom Fields:
Custom Fields for Supplier Invoices in SAP Ariba Invoicing | SAP Help Portal


But is there a way to fill these fields with supplier master data? 
I only read, that it's a field for input in Ariba Invoicing.


Regards, 
Stefanie

SAP Ariba Invoicing

entry.title: Is it possible to add a custom field to sap maintenance assistant?
entry.content:
Hello, we are trying to add a custom field to the SAP Maintenance Assistant that we created in Cloud ERP. We are at the start of our search and we are not even sure if the maintenance assistant is extendable.

Has anyone any experience with it?

entry.title: S/4HANA Public Cloud: How to copy custom extension field value to standard Product field in SO
entry.content:
Environment: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud

BUSINESS REQUIREMENT:
Industry requirement where ProductDescription (40 chars) is insufficient. A custom field (140 chars) stores the full product name on the Product master. A custom search field on Sales Document Item allows users to search by this extended name and select a product.

SCENARIO:
1. Custom field YY1_CUSTFIELD_SDI on Sales Document Item (Code List based on CDS View)
2. Custom VH searches products by extended name field
3. User selects product → YY1_CUSTFIELD_SDI populated with Product ID ✅
4. Need: automatically copy this to standard Product field ❌

WHAT WE TRIED:

1. MDE additionalBinding on C_SalesOrderItemManage→ "Use of CDS Entity not permitted" #CUSTOMER layer

2. BAdI SD_SLS_MODIFY_ITEM_BUSINESS

→ Can write standard Product field ✅

→ Cannot read E_SALESDOCUMENTITEMBASIC ❌

3. Extension BAdI SD_SLS_MODIFY_ITEM
→ Can read SALESDOCUMENTITEM_EXTENSION_I ✅
→ Cannot write standard Product field ❌

4. KUE auto-generated MDE (/1BCWDY/ namespace)
→ Not editable ❌

5. D_SalesOrderItemProductCVH
→ @Metadata.allowExtensions missing ❌

QUESTION:
Is there a supported BAdI or extensibility approach in S/4HANA Public Cloud to copy a value from a custom extension field to the standard Product field on Sales Order Item?

SD (Sales and Distribution)

entry.title: Extensibility options for SAP Real Estate in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Hello.

I am currently working with SAP Real Estate in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and analyzing the available extensibility options, especially for scenarios that have an impact on Financial Accounting (FI).

 
After reviewing the released Business Contexts in the system, and also checking the SAP Business Accelerator Hub, I noticed the following:
  • There is no Business Context available for SAP Real Estate objects to be used as Usable Objects, which limits their reuse in custom developments.
  • The number of released enhancement options for SAP Real Estate is quite limited, especially for scenarios affecting accounting behavior.
  • Based on what is available in the system, the enhancement options / BAdIs I can see are, for example:
    • BADI_RECE_VALUATION_PARAMETER (valuation parameter settings)
    • BADI_RECN_CONTRACT_CHECK_ALL
    • BADI_RECN_CONTRACT_SUBSTITUTE
    • REGO_CFD_RO_RAP_FEATURES (visibility control for Real Estate Rentable Object)

Given this situation, I would like to better understand SAP’s intended extensibility strategy for Real Estate in the public cloud:

  • What are the recommended extensibility approaches for extending Real Estate processes that have an impact on FI?
  • Are there any released APIs, BAdIs, or events specifically intended for SAP Real Estate extensibility in the public cloud, beyond the limited set currently available in the system?
  • Is there any roadmap or best-practice documentation explaining how SAP expects customer-specific accounting logic to be implemented for Real Estate scenarios in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition?
  • Is the absence of a Business Context for exposing SAP Real Estate objects as Usable Objects intentional, and is there any plan to provide such a Business Context in the future?

Any clarification or guidance would be highly appreciated.

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Is it possible to assign In-App Custom App to Business Catalog created by Developer extensibility
entry.content:
Hi,

I have created In-App Custom App by Key User Extensibility in s4hana public cloud.

And I don't want to assign that app to standard business catalog.

But, in s4hana public cloud, it is not possible to create custom Business Catalog by Key User Extensibility.

So, I need to create custom Business Catalog in Eclipse by Developer Extensibility.

Is it possible to assign Key User Extensibility Custom App to Developer Extensibility custom Business Catalog?

Could you please guide me?

 

Best Regards,

Aye Chan
